name: jjam_siem_security_analyst
description: SIEM conversational security analyst agent for jjam-siem-dojo

tools.description: Search jjam-siem-logs index. All fields are already type 'keyword' or 'date' - do NOT append '.keyword' to any field name (e.g. use event_type not event_type.keyword). Fields: event_type, severity, alert_type, src_ip, dst_ip, advanced_metadata.risk_score, advanced_metadata.confidence, bytes, duration, action, category, protocol, description, timestamp (date format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'). IMPORTANT - keep the query SIMPLE, do not write aggregations: the action_input value itself IS already the final JSON string, do not add extra escaping or quote layers. Use ONLY this exact shape (index + a plain query with size, no aggs): {"index": "jjam-siem-logs", "query": {"size": 20, "query": {"term": {"severity": "critical"}}}}. If the question needs counting or 'which value appears most' (e.g. top event_type), do NOT try to write an aggregation - instead retrieve up to 50 matching documents with a simple query like above, then count/summarize the field values yourself from the returned documents.
